questions.question: What are the steps to publish a project from the CodePup AI interface, and how can I ensure that it is continuously updated after publishing?
questions.source_chunk:
[Publishing Projects | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/features/publish

## On this page
  * [ Overview ](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/publish#_top)
  * [ Deployment Overview ](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/publish#deployment-overview)
  * [ Continuous Updates ](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/publish#continuous-updates)
  * [ How to Publish ](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/p
questions.gold_answer:
To publish from CodePup AI: open your project, make sure the preview is available and error free, then click Share (top right) → Generate shareable URL. That gives you a live link you can share. 
For continuous updates: every time you modify your app and re deploy, the same project URL stays active and automatically shows the latest deployment (older builds are replaced, not kept).
If you restore an older version and want that version live, go back to Share → Generate shareable URL again - the same link will update to reflect the restored version.

questions.question: What steps do I need to follow to enter my Resend API Key and Stripe Secret Key when starting a new project on Codepup AI?
questions.source_chunk:
[Resend Integration | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/integration/resend-integration

Using a custom domain improves email deliverability and prevents your emails from landing in spam folders.
This verified sender email is used automatically by Codepup AI when sending emails from your project.
* * *
### Step 3 - Enter Your Resend Key in Codepup AI
[](https://docs.codepup.ai/integration
questions.gold_answer:
To enter your Resend API Key and Stripe Secret Key when starting a new project on Codepup AI, follow these steps:

1. Start a new project by typing your project idea in the prompt box.
2. Select **E-Commerce Store (fullstack + payment)**.
3. Enter your Resend API Key in the designated field.
4. Enter your Stripe Secret Key in the appropriate field. 

Make sure to verify your sender email for improved email deliverability.

questions.question: What are the available paid plans for CodePup AI?
questions.source_chunk:
[Plans and Credits | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/introduction/plans-and-credits

## On this page
  * [ Overview ](https://docs.codepup.ai/introduction/plans-and-credits#_top)
  * [ Feature Comparison: Free vs. Paid Plans ](https://docs.codepup.ai/introduction/plans-and-credits#feature-comparison-free-vs-paid-plans)
  * [ Available Paid Plans ](https://docs.codepup.ai/introduction/p
questions.gold_answer:
The available paid plans for CodePup AI are:
Plan	Monthly Credits	Monthly Billing	Annual Billing (Discounted)
Basic	100	$25	$250 ($21/month)
Pro	220	$50	$500 ($42/month)
Advance	1,100	$200	$2,000 ($167/month)
Additionally, there are Custom Credits available for paid users, where $10 equals 40 credits, and users can choose any amount in $10 increments up to $200

questions.question: What steps do I need to follow to manage my data through Codepup AI's CMS without needing a Supabase account, and how does project deletion affect my data?
questions.source_chunk:
[Supabase Integration | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/integration/supabase-integration

You never need to touch Supabase directly - the CMS is your window into your database.
For a full guide on managing your data, see the [CMS documentation](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/cms/).
* * *
## Common Questions
[](https://docs.codepup.ai/integration/supabase-integration#common-questions)
questions.gold_answer:
You don’t need a Supabase account at all. Codepup AI creates and manages the Supabase backend for you automatically when you create a project, so you can manage your data entirely through our CMS.
To manage your data:
Open your project, then click the database icon in the top right to open the CMS.
Pick a table from the left sidebar, then add, edit, or delete records in the main panel.
Or use the AI Assistant to bulk insert data by describing what you want in plain English.
Project deletion: deleting a Codepup AI project also deletes the associated Supabase project and all its data, so export anything you need first.

questions.question: What are environment variables, and how can I open the Key Tab to update my API key?
questions.source_chunk:
[Environment Variables (API KEY) | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/features/environmental-variables

## On this page
  * [ Overview ](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/environmental-variables#_top)
  * [ What Are Environment Variables? ](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/environmental-variables#what-are-environment-variables)
  * [ How to Open the Key Tab ](https://docs.codepup.ai/featur
questions.gold_answer:
Environment variables are secret values your project uses to connect to external services, such as Stripe for payments or Resend for emails. They are stored securely on the server and are never exposed in your frontend code or the browser.

To open the Key Tab and update your API key, follow these steps:

Click the Key tab.
Enter your new API key in the relevant field.
Leave other fields empty if you want to keep existing values intact

CodePup AI will automatically generate your project structure, components, and design in seconds. * * *

```
sk_test_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
```

Click **Proceed** - Codepup AI will begin modifying your project to add the ful
questions.gold_answer: You should use your **test key** (`sk_test_...`) while building and testing with Stripe.

questions.question: What are the supported sources for video embedding in CodePup AI, and what limitations should I be aware of when embedding videos?
questions.source_chunk:
[Video Embedding Support | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/features/embed-video

Players are generated using clean, native HTML and React/Next.js patterns to ensure fast load times.
* * *
## Supported Sources
[](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/embed-video#supported-sources)
CodePup AI can embed videos from:
  * YouTube
  * Vimeo
  * Cloud and CDN video URLs
  * Private blob storage li
questions.gold_answer:
CodePup AI supports embedding videos from the following sources:
- YouTube
- Vimeo
- Cloud and CDN video URLs
- Private blob storage links
- Internal media servers
- Any public video payload with a valid MIME type

Limitations include that video **uploads** are not supported.

questions.question: What are the key differences between using CodePup AI as a developer assistant versus traditional coding methods?
questions.source_chunk:
[Welcome | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai

## On this page
  * [ Overview ](https://docs.codepup.ai/#_top)
  * [ Built for Everyone ](https://docs.codepup.ai/#built-for-everyone)
  * [ Why CodePup AI? ](https://docs.codepup.ai/#why-codepup-ai)

# Welcome
CodePup AI is your **AI-powered developer assistant** , capable of turning ideas into fully functional, production-ready web applica
questions.gold_answer:
The key differences between using CodePup AI as a developer assistant and traditional coding methods include:

1. **Speed**: CodePup AI can turn ideas into fully functional web applications in minutes, whereas traditional coding methods typically take much longer.
2. **Automation**: CodePup AI automates the coding, design, and deployment processes, while traditional methods require manual coding and separate steps for design and deployment.
3. **Ease of Use**: Users can simply describe their requirements to CodePup AI, making it more accessible for those without extensive coding knowledge, unlike traditional methods that require programming skills.
4. **Seamless Workflow**: CodePup AI provides an integrated workflow, combining all aspects of development in one platform, whereas traditional methods often involve multiple tools and processes.

questions.question: What are the differences between using a sharable URL and a custom domain for publishing your project in CodePup AI?
questions.source_chunk:
[Custom Domain | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/features/custom-domain

* * *
## Step-by-Step Setup Guide
[](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/custom-domain#step-by-step-setup-guide)
### Step 1: Publish Your Project
[](https://docs.codepup.ai/features/custom-domain#step-1-publish-your-project)
From your project dashboard, click **Generate sharable URL**. ![Generate shareable URL](https
questions.gold_answer:
The differences between using a sharable URL and a custom domain for publishing your project in CodePup AI include:

1. **URL Format**: A sharable URL is typically a generic link provided by CodePup AI, while a custom domain allows you to use your own personalized web address.
2. **Branding**: A custom domain enhances branding and professionalism, making it easier for users to remember and trust your project.
3. **Control**: With a custom domain, you have more control over the domain name and can manage it independently, whereas a sharable URL is managed by CodePup AI.
4. **SEO Benefits**: A custom domain can improve search engine optimization (SEO) compared to a generic sharable URL.

questions.question: What steps do I need to take to test my payment integration using the provided test card, and how can I switch from test payments to live payments after confirming the payment flow is working?
questions.source_chunk:
[Stripe Payment Integration | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/integration/stripe-integration

```
Test Card Number : 4242 4242 4242 4242
Expiry           : Any future date
CVC              : Any 3 digits
```

Not sure which type your project generated? Just visit your checkout page after integration - it will be immediately clear. You can always ask Codepup AI in the chat to switch or
questions.gold_answer:
To test your payment integration using the provided test card, follow these steps:

1. **Integrate Stripe**: Ensure that you have integrated Stripe into your project as per the guidelines provided by CodePup AI.
2. **Use Test Card**: On your checkout page, enter the test card number `4242 4242 4242 4242`, any future expiry date, and any 3-digit CVC.
3. **Confirm Payment Flow**: Complete the checkout process to simulate a successful payment. Verify that the order is confirmed.

After confirming that the payment flow is working:

1. **Switch to Live Payments**: To switch from test payments to live payments, visit your Stripe dashboard and update your API keys from test to live mode.
2. **Adjust Checkout Style**: If needed, you can ask CodePup AI in the chat to help switch or adjust the checkout style for live payments.

Ensure that you have entered the correct API keys and that they are properly configured before attempting to generate the project.

questions.question: What steps should I take to ensure my API keys remain secure while using CodePup AI, and how does the platform handle sensitive information included in prompts?
questions.source_chunk:
[Security & Safe Usage | CodePup AI]
Source: https://docs.codepup.ai/features/security

These dialog boxes appear **before generation begins** , ensuring secrets stay isolated from your main prompt.
Your API keys are used only for:
  * Validating service connections
  * Setting up environment variables
  * Auto-configuring integrations (if requested)

They are **never** logged or stored elsewhere.
questions.gold_answer:
To ensure your API keys remain secure while using CodePup AI, follow these steps:

1. **Use Dialog Boxes**: Enter your API keys in the dialog boxes that appear before generation begins, as this keeps them isolated from your main prompt.
2. **Avoid Sharing Secrets**: Do not share sensitive information in prompts, as CodePup AI is not responsible for secrets shared in Pro.

Regarding how the platform handles sensitive information, your API keys are used solely for validating service connections, setting up environment variables, and auto-configuring integrations. They are never logged or stored elsewhere, and are not included in analytics or training operations.
